items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• When do you need to go there? I like my house ve ry much.
• When do you need to go downtown? I like my family very much.
• When do you need to go the store? I study in the city.
• When do you need to go the bank? I work on the far m.
• 2- How do you prefer your steak, medium or rare?

items.text: When do you need to go there? I like my house ve ry much.
When do you need to go downtown? I like my family very much.
When do you need to go the store? I study in the city.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Quando você precisa ir ao centro? Eu gosto muito da minha família

When do you need to go downtown? I like my family very much 3.

city the in study I store? the go to need you do When.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Quando você precisa ir ao banco? Eu trabalho na f azenda

When do you need to go the bank? I work on the far m.
When do you need to go the bank? I work on the far m 3.

items.answer: When do you need to go the bank? I work on the far m.
2- How do you prefer your steak, medium or rare?
